sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Try rotating to face DOWN (1 SPACE from LEFT)
result = action(['SPACE'])
print("After SPACE:", result['state'], "done:", result.get('done'), "level_completed:", result.get('level_completed'))

seg = current_frame.segmentation
r_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
g_blocks = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
print(f"R blocks: {len(r_blocks)}, G blocks: {len(g_blocks)}")
for n in r_blocks + g_blocks:
    b = n['boundary']
    rows = [p[0] for p in b]
    cols = [p[1] for p in b]
    print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")

# Try moving RIGHT
if not result.get('level_completed'):
    result2 = action(['RIGHT'])
    print("\nAfter RIGHT:", result2['state'], "done:", result2.get('done'), "level_completed:", result2.get('level_completed'))
    
    seg2 = current_frame.segmentation
    r_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
    g_blocks2 = [n for n in seg2['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
    print(f"R blocks: {len(r_blocks2)}, G blocks: {len(g_blocks2)}")
    for n in r_blocks2 + g_blocks2:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
    
    # Try moving RIGHT again
    if not result2.get('level_completed'):
        result3 = action(['RIGHT'])
        print("\nAfter 2nd RIGHT:", result3['state'], "done:", result3.get('done'), "level_completed:", result3.get('level_completed'))
        
        seg3 = current_frame.segmentation
        r_blocks3 = [n for n in seg3['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
        g_blocks3 = [n for n in seg3['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
        print(f"R blocks: {len(r_blocks3)}, G blocks: {len(g_blocks3)}")
        for n in r_blocks3 + g_blocks3:
            b = n['boundary']
            rows = [p[0] for p in b]
            cols = [p[1] for p in b]
            print(f"  id={n['id']} color={n['color']} pixels={n['pixels']} rows=[{min(rows)},{max(rows)}] cols=[{min(cols)},{max(cols)}]")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
